help.short: The name of the service group.
Name of the SLI that is given by the user.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="destinationAmwAccounts" required="True" identifiers="resourceId">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="destinationMetrics" identifiers="metricNamespace metricName">
<prop type="array" name="signalSources" required="True" identifiers="signalSourceId">
<prop type="array" name="filters" required="True" identifiers="scalarFunction dimensionName samplingType operator value">
<prop type="array" name="dimensions" required="True">

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

help.short: The name of the service group.
Name of the SLI that is given by the user.

command.name: create

help.short: The name of the service group.
Name of the SLI that is given by the user.

command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.destinationAmwAccounts" options="destination-amw-accounts" group="Properties">
<arg type="array" var="@Signal_create.signalSources" options="signal-sources" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="@Signal_create.signalSources[].filters" options="filters" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="@Signal_create.signalSources[].spatialAggregation.dimensions" options="dimensions" required="True">

prop.name: sliProperties
prop.prop:
<prop type="array" name="signalSources" arg="@Signal_create.signalSources" required="True" identifiers="signalSourceId">
<prop type="array" name="filters" arg="@Signal_create.signalSources[].filters" required="True" identifiers="scalarFunction dimensionName samplingType operator value">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="destinationAmwAccounts" required="True" identifiers="resourceId">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="destinationMetrics" identifiers="metricNamespace metricName">
<prop type="array" name="signalSources" required="True" identifiers="signalSourceId">
<prop type="array" name="filters" required="True" identifiers="scalarFunction dimensionName samplingType operator value">
<prop type="array" name="dimensions" required="True">

command.name: update

help.short: The name of the service group.
Name of the SLI that is given by the user.
Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

The set of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The userAssignedIdentities dictionary keys will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}. The dictionary values can be empty objects ({}) in requests.

command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.destinationAmwAccounts" options="destination-amw-accounts" group="Properties">
<arg type="array" var="@Signal_update.signalSources" options="signal-sources">
<arg type="array" var="@Signal_update.signalSources[].filters" options="filters">
<arg type="array" var="@Signal_update.signalSources[].spatialAggregation.dimensions" options="dimensions">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="destinationAmwAccounts" required="True" identifiers="resourceId">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="destinationMetrics" identifiers="metricNamespace metricName">
<prop type="array" name="signalSources" required="True" identifiers="signalSourceId">
<prop type="array" name="filters" required="True" identifiers="scalarFunction dimensionName samplingType operator value">
<prop type="array" name="dimensions" required="True">

prop.name: sliProperties
prop.prop:
<prop type="array" name="signalSources" arg="@Signal_update.signalSources" required="True" identifiers="signalSourceId">
<prop type="array" name="filters" arg="@Signal_update.signalSources[].filters" required="True" identifiers="scalarFunction dimensionName samplingType operator value">
